process_message: process a user message through the LLM agent loop with streaming responses and concurrent tool execution
execute_tool: execute a tool with permission checks, approval callbacks, and hook integration for a given session
build_messages: build the message list for an LLM call including system prompt, MCP context, and todo reminders
parse_tool_args: parse tool call argument JSON with a repair fallback that strips residual model special tokens
patch_orphan_tool_calls: patch orphan tool calls on a message by inserting synthetic results for interrupted tool dispatches
